integrity.description: Verify the agent used the 2N Access Commander web GUI for all configuration tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander interface (https://localhost:9443) through Time Profiles, Groups, Zones, Access Rules, and Users sections, rather than terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify all configurations were entered through the application's actual forms, dropdowns, and save buttons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent filling in form fields, selecting options from dropdowns, and clicking save buttons within the 2N Access Commander application rather than using a text editor or mock UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to create entities via the REST API.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows with curl commands, Python scripts, or other programmatic API calls being used to create time profiles, groups, zones, rules, or users.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to alter the page text or inject fake success states.

IT PINs: Kwame Asante (card 0004521885 preserved, PIN 223344 added) and Mei-Ling Zhang (card 0004521886 preserved, PIN 223344 added). Report: ~/Documents/rd_onboarding.txt with all details.
